text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the last day of the training camp...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer? That was super fast, right?
choice_data_list: Incredibly fast for running on sand!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I feel like I leveled up during the training camp!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was fast before, but now I'm even faster! My
speed is more Bakushin than ever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Victory in the Sprinters Stakes is all mine! It's as
good as in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I don't win by a huge lead, I'll change my name
to "Sakura O"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Anything other than a victory is
unthinkable after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Please enjoy watching from the sidelines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Sakura Bakushin O's passionate (?)
summer camp adventures come to an end.
